New: MCP endpoint for ChatGPT connector integration
OAuth authorization, token exchange, and refresh flow
Quark admin settings app with About, Connectors, and Advanced tabs
Advanced option to remove plugin data on uninstall
Improved: Settings UI migrated to class-based markup with dedicated stylesheet
Connector setup experience redesigned with accordion-style Configure flow
Field-level copy actions for connector configuration values
POST nonce-based admin actions for improved reliability over nonce links
Selectable ChatGPT OAuth registration method for user-defined clients or Dynamic Client Registration
Mode-aware OAuth metadata so ChatGPT sees only the active client registration flow
Streamable HTTP MCP endpoint behavior with SSE negotiation support
Requester-scoped DCR rate limiting to prevent false 429 errors during ChatGPT app setup
Resource-scoped OAuth metadata support for ChatGPT setups using the MCP URL as authorization server base
OAuth approval callback and token exchange resilience for ChatGPT DCR connector setup
Early well-known metadata handling to avoid WordPress canonical redirects serving HTML to ChatGPT
More tolerant token endpoint rate limit for ChatGPT OAuth retry behavior
Dev: Added prerelease GitHub Action to build Composer and npm artifacts on release
Added AGENTS.md standards for planning-first workflow and release discipline
